On this page

Enterprise Intelligence API ​

Unlock America's Hidden Workforce Data

Government hiring surges indicate upcoming contract opportunities 60-90 days before RFPs are released. Stop manually tracking thousands of agencies - get predictive intelligence that puts you ahead of the competition.

Why PenPublic Enterprise API? ​

Predictive Contract Intelligence

  • Government hiring surges predict major contract opportunities months in advance
  • Detect agency hiring surges 60-90 days before RFPs are released
  • Geographic arbitrage opportunities worth millions in premium markets
  • Security clearance demand forecasting for defense contractors

Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure

  • 43,000+ government job postings analyzed weekly across 15,000+ agencies
  • Coverage: California, New York, Texas, Florida (40% of US government workforce)
  • Weekly updates every Monday with fresh intelligence
  • RESTful API with 99.5% uptime SLA on Cloudflare infrastructure

Pricing ​

Basic Plan - $1,000/month ​

  • 10,000 API requests/day
  • 4 states and DC: CA, NY, TX, FL
  • Intelligence endpoints
  • Email support

Professional Plan - $3,500/month ​

  • Everything in Basic Plan
  • 50,000 API requests/day (5x more)

Enterprise Plan - $10,000/month ​

  • Everything in Basic Plan
  • 250,000 API requests/day (25x more)

Enterprise Plus - Contact Us ​

  • High-volume access
  • Custom integrations
  • White-label options

Who Uses PenPublic ​

Government Contractors - BD teams tracking contract opportunities before RFPs

Executive Recruiters - Staffing firms placing cleared professionals

HR Tech Platforms - SaaS companies needing government salary data

Investment Firms - Analysts tracking government spending patterns

Get Started ​

Transform your business development with intelligence that predicts opportunities months in advance.

API Guide: click here

Contact: info@penpublic.com

Serving America's most recession-resistant workforce with enterprise-grade intelligence
